posts.text: Enjoyed spending time with President Trump in my hometown of Cincinnati today. Great conversations with local workers about delivering lower costs, bigger paychecks, and better schools. We’ll do our part in Ohio. 🇺🇸 🇺🇸

posts.text:
The best way to bring down the cost of homes is to increase the supply & cutting the regulations that get in the way. That shouldn’t be controversial, it’s common sense.

Video
posts.quote:

posts.text: The President did a great job last night in laying out sensible energy policies to bring down electric bills for everyday Americans. In Ohio, I’ll ensure that hyperscalers pay for their own energy usage, and we’ll produce more energy too, to bring down costs for consumers.
posts.quote: The President did a great job last night in laying out sensible energy policies to bring down electric bills for everyday Americans. In Ohio, I’ll ensure that hyperscalers pay for their own energy usage, and we’ll produce more energy too, to bring down costs for consumers.

posts.text:
It’s the 250th anniversary of the Declaration of Independence, and I’m grateful to hear tonight from a Commander-in-Chief who is actually proud of our country. Can’t deny that.

Video

posts.text:
The first part of addressing affordability is to undo the inflation crisis created by government overgrowth under Biden, but the other half is to increase wealth—by putting more money back in Americans’ pockets.

Video

Lower property taxes, lower electric bills, lower housing costs.

Bigger paychecks, better schools, more wealth creation.

Coming soon to Ohio.

posts.text: Mamdani just said the only way to avoid local property tax increases is to raise state taxes massively. It’s funny, Amy Acton effectively said the exact same thing last week when she criticized Ohio’s recent income tax cuts. Sorry folks, this is America, not a socialist hellscape.

posts.text:
We’re going to bring down property taxes, improve our schools, and preserve public safety. That requires a businessman, not a bureaucrat.

posts.text: Jails shouldn’t be the most common way we deal with severe psychiatric illnesses. It’s past time to bring back mental health institutions & to do it in the right way. Great discussion with Sheriffs across our state, ahead of their training sessions today.

posts.text: We hear the grassroots across our state loud & clear: slash property taxes, fix failing schools, bring high-paying jobs to our state, and conduct economic development in a way that puts local communities first. Grateful for GOP county endorsements from Preble & Brown counties this week, joining our coalition. We’re ready to lift Ohio to greater heights than ever. 💪🏼
